subject: mizugumo
object: Per the Bansenshūkai ninja of the Fujibayashi family reportedly used this water-flotation device.

subject: mizugumo
object: Despite depictions as shoes for walking on water, the design more plausibly centred on a wooden platform meant to be sat on rather than stood on, functioning as a buoyancy aid rather than footwear.
